headline: Is Most-Watched Stock Freeport-McMoRan Inc. (FCX) Worth Betting on Now?
summary: Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) has been one of the stocks most watched by Zacks.com users lately. So, it is worth exploring what lies ahead for the stock.

headline: How Strait of Hormuz closure can become tipping point for global economy
summary: A Strait of Hormuz closure due to U.S.-Iran war hit the oil market hard, but sectors reliant on shipping across economy from metals to farming are vulnerable.
